column14: Info:
Made By CookiestMonster
Current to Terraria version 1.4.4.9
Check list last updated: 05/02/2025
Huge thanks to the Official Terraria Wiki for the list of items & images. As well as
u/Mewitti for making the original list. which was later updated by u/Crusader_1567
I have further updated it to include all unobtainable, removed, and re-implemented items.
The name "Princess Dresses" appears twice (one is from Clothier, one is from Goodie Bag) they are different spirtes
The name “Seaweed” appears twice, but they are different items (one is junk, one is a pet)
The name “Strange Plant” appears four times in a row, each being a different color.
The name “Deathweed Planter Box” appears twice, with one is crimson and corruption only
The name "Constellation" appears twice one as a painting and the other is a Weapon Summoner Whip
Flairon has been changed to Flairoon which is a new item that replace the old item but they added a new item that is the old item with the name Flairon in 1.4.5
Desktop 1.4.5.4: Renamed This is Canon Now painting to Brasilian Skies.
Item States are items that I wouldn’t really consider true items they are simply closed or inactive versions of already existing items.
the Carrot is missing entirely from the Console version Carrot cannot be researched without having bought the Collector's Edition, making it impossible for most
players to research every obtainable item, as the Collector's Edition is no longer being sold.
1.4.4 reimplemented Pixel Box, Mini Star Cell Banner.
As of 1.4.5 all items are 9999 max stack apart from 4 items Copper, Sliver, Gold Coin and coal
Total Obtainable Items 6084 (Console 6083) Unobtainable 6144
